answers.question: Who won the 2022 FIFA World Cup? Answer in one sentence.
answers.answer: Argentina, led by Lionel Messi, won the 2022 FIFA World Cup by defeating France 4-2 in a penalty shootout after the match ended 3-3 after extra time on December 18, 2022.
